items.title: Claude Code Adds Dynamic Workflows for Parallel Agent Coordination
items.summaryShort: Claude Code Adds Dynamic Workflows for Parallel Agent Coordination. Anthropic introduced Dynamic Workflows, a new capability for Claude Code designed to handle complex software engineering tasks by coordinating large numbers of AI agents wi

items.title: Shopify Reports 15X Faster Graphql Execution with Breadth First Engine
items.summaryShort: Shopify Reports 15X Faster Graphql Execution with Breadth First Engine. Shopify introduced GraphQL Cardinal, a new execution engine replacing depth-first traversal with breadth-first execution.

items.title: BadHost Vulnerability Exposes AI Agents, Evaluators, and LLM Gateways
items.summaryShort: BadHost Vulnerability Exposes AI Agents, Evaluators, and LLM Gateways. BadHost is a high-severity authentication bypass vulnerability in the widely used Python web framework Starlette, with 325 million weekly downloads.

items.title: Presentation: Theme Systems at Scale: How To Build Highly Customizable Software
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Theme Systems at Scale: How To Build Highly Customizable Software. Shopify Staff Engineer Guilherme Carreiro discusses building and scaling highly customizable platforms.

items.title: Article: The AI Productivity Paradox in Test Automation: Moving Beyond Structural Validation to Perception and Intent
items.summaryShort: Article: The AI Productivity Paradox in Test Automation: Moving Beyond Structural Validation to Perception and Intent. The AI productivity paradox states that AI scales whatever abstraction it is built on.

items.title: A new app, The Mall, is building a universal feed for online shopping
items.summaryShort: A new app, The Mall, is building a universal feed for online shopping. The Mall lets shoppers build a personalized feed of brands, track sales and drops, and discover products across thousands of retailers.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto V cheat service gets hacked, exposing thousands of gamers
items.summaryShort: Grand Theft Auto V cheat service gets hacked, exposing thousands of gamers. Hackers stole usernames, hashed passwords, and other data from a service that allowed players to cheat in Grand Theft Auto V.

items.title: Zigging when most are zagging, ex-Meta CTO raises $250M climate fund
items.summaryShort: Zigging when most are zagging, ex-Meta CTO raises $250M climate fund. Mike Schroepfer's Gigascale Capital has raised a large fund to back founders building climate-friendly solutions for the world's energy and material shortages.
